title: Transformation
wikitext:
[[File:GOKU SSJ1 Transformation.gif|thumb|center|600px|[[Son Goku (Dragon Ball Z)|Son Goku]] transforming into a Super Saiyan.]]

==Summary==
'''Transformation''' is the ability to transform parts of one body or slightly modify their forms through external power-ups, gradual mutations over a period of time, or through limited or uncontrollable change in form. It also includes characters with a very limited number of set transformations.

For those who are able to freely transform the shape of their bodies to assume different identities, impersonate others, and modify the entirety of their bodies at will with great versatility, see the [[Shapeshifting]] page instead.

==Examples of Users==
*[[MegaMan.EXE|Net]][[ProtoMan.EXE|Navis]] and [[Mega Man (Star Force)|EM]] [[Harp Note|Wave]] [[Acid Ace|Humans]] ([[Mega Man (Franchise)|Mega Man]])
*[[Mario]] ([[Mario Bros]])
*[[Acacia (Toriko)|Acacia]] ([[Toriko (Verse)|Toriko]])
*[[Son Goku (Dragon Ball Z)|Sai]][[Vegeta (Dragon Ball Z)|yans]] and [[Son Gohan (Dragon Ball Z)|Half-]][[Future Trunks|Saiyans]] ([[Dragon Ball]])
*Most of the characters in [[Transformers]]
*[[Ultraman (Ultra Series)|Ultraman]] and [[Ultraman Zero (Heisei)|Ultraman Zero]] ([[Ultra Series]])
*[[Kamen Rider Ichigo]] and most of the other [[Kamen Rider]] characters
*Werewolves
